positive: A stylized, minimalist design featuring a majestic mountain range silhouette meeting a vast, stylized sunset sky. The mountains are rendered in deep indigo and midnight blue, providing a sharp contrast to the fiery orange, gold, and coral gradients of the sky. Scattered amongst the mountains are subtle, stylized constellations and geometric abstract flora. The overall composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable, designed for screen printing on dark apparel. Clean vector aesthetic, high contrast, vibrant sunset colors, ethereal glow, flat graphic design.
negative: blurry, noise, text, logo, trademark, watermark, low detail, gradient artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, photography, painting, signature
